Imports

clformat, htemplates, halgorithm, hlex_base, htext_algo, hpprint, oswrap, colorstring, colortext, hdebug_misc, hshell

Types

HLogLevel = enum
  logAll, logTrace, logDebug, logInfo, logNotice, logWarn, logError, logFatal,
  logNone
HLogEvent = enum
  logEvNone, logEvPass, logEvSuccess, logEvFail, logEvWaitStart, logEvWaitDone,
  logEvExprDump
HLogger = ref object
  minLogLevel: HLogLevel
  lastLog: HLogLevel
  lastEvent: HLogEvent
  scopes: seq[HLogScope]
  eventPrefix: array[HLogEvent, HLogFormat]
  logPrefix: array[HLogLevel, HLogFormat]
  prefixLen: int

Procs

proc newTermLogger(): HLogger {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc prepareText(logger: HLogger; text: varargs[string]): string {...}{.raises: [],
    tags: [].}
proc log(logger: HLogger; level: HLogLevel; event: HLogEvent;
         position: (string, int, int); args: varargs[string, `$`]) {...}{.
    raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}
proc openScope(logger: HLogger; kind: HLogScopeKind; file: string;
               line, column: int; scopeName: string) {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc closeScope(logger: HLogger) {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc indent(logger: HLogger) {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc dedent(logger: HLogger) {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc prepareDump[T](expr: T): string
proc debug(logger: HLogger; pos: (string, int, int); args: varargs[string, `$`]) {...}{.
    raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}
proc trace(logger: HLogger; pos: (string, int, int); args: varargs[string, `$`]) {...}{.
    raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}
proc info(logger: HLogger; pos: (string, int, int); args: varargs[string, `$`]) {...}{.
    raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}
proc notice(logger: HLogger; pos: (string, int, int); args: varargs[string, `$`]) {...}{.
    raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}
proc warn(logger: HLogger; pos: (string, int, int); args: varargs[string, `$`]) {...}{.
    raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}
proc err(logger: HLogger; pos: (string, int, int); args: varargs[string, `$`]) {...}{.
    raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}
proc fatal(logger: HLogger; pos: (string, int, int); args: varargs[string, `$`]) {...}{.
    raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}
proc wait(logger: HLogger; pos: (string, int, int); args: varargs[string, `$`]) {...}{.
    raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}
proc done(logger: HLogger; pos: (string, int, int); args: varargs[string, `$`]) {...}{.
    raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}
proc fail(logger: HLogger; pos: (string, int, int); args: varargs[string, `$`]) {...}{.
    raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}
proc success(logger: HLogger; pos: (string, int, int);
             args: varargs[string, `$`]) {...}{.raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}
proc logLines(logger: HLogger; base: string; center: int; lang: string) {...}{.
    raises: [ValueError, KeyError], tags: [].}
proc logStackTrace(logger: HLogger; e: ref Exception; showError: bool = true) {...}{.
    raises: [ValueError, IOError, KeyError], tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadIOEffect].}
proc loggerOutConverter(stream: var PosStr; cmd: ShellCmd;
                        state: var Option[HLogger]): Option[bool] {...}{.
    raises: [IOError, OSError, ArgumentError, ValueError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc loggerErrConverter(stream: var PosStr; cmd: ShellCmd;
                        state: var Option[HLogger]): Option[bool] {...}{.
    raises: [ValueError, IOError, OSError, ArgumentError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc execShell(logger: HLogger; pos: (string, int, int); shellCmd: ShellCmd;
    outLog: StreamConverter[ShellCmd, bool, HLogger] = loggerOutConverter;
    errLog: StreamConverter[ShellCmd, bool, HLogger] = loggerErrConverter;
               logRaised: bool = false) {...}{.raises: [ValueError, Exception,
    OSError, ShellError, IOError, Exception, ValueError, ShellError:ObjectType],
    tags: [RootEffect, ExecIOEffect, ReadEnvEffect, WriteIOEffect].}
proc runShell(logger: HLogger; pos: (string, int, int); shellCmd: ShellCmd): ShellExecResult {...}{.raises: [
    ValueError, Exception, ArgumentError, OSError, ShellError, IOError],
    tags: [RootEffect, ShellExecEffect, ExecIOEffect, ReadEnvEffect].}

Funcs

func findLineRange(base: string; start: Slice[int]; around: (int, int) = (0, 0)): Slice[
    int] {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func lineTextAround(base: string; charRange: Slice[int];
                    around: (int, int) = (1, 1)): tuple[text: string,
    startPos, endPos: int] {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func linesAround(base: string; line: int; around: (int, int) = (1, 1)): seq[
    string] {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}

Methods

method log(ex: ref Exception; logger: HLogger) {...}{.base, raises: [ValueError],
    tags: [].}
method log(ex: ShellError; logger: HLogger) {...}{.raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}

Macros

macro logScope(varname: untyped; pr: untyped): untyped

Templates

template thisScope(logger: HLogger; name: string; kind: HLogScopeKind = hskScope)
template openScope(logger: HLogger; kind: HLogScopeKind; name: string)
template check(logger: HLogger; expr: bool; desc: string; expected: bool = true;
               onMatch: HLogLevel = logInfo; onFail: HLogLevel = logNotice): bool
template dump(logger: HLogger; expr: untyped; other: varargs[string, `$`]): untyped
template pdump(logger: HLogger; expr: untyped; other: varargs[string, `$`]): untyped
template debug(logger: HLogger; args: varargs[string, `$`]): untyped
template trace(logger: HLogger; args: varargs[string, `$`]): untyped
template info(logger: HLogger; args: varargs[string, `$`]): untyped
template notice(logger: HLogger; args: varargs[string, `$`]): untyped
template warn(logger: HLogger; args: varargs[string, `$`]): untyped
template err(logger: HLogger; args: varargs[string, `$`]): untyped
template fatal(logger: HLogger; args: varargs[string, `$`]): untyped
template wait(logger: HLogger; args: varargs[string, `$`]): untyped
template done(logger: HLogger; args: varargs[string, `$`]): untyped
template fail(logger: HLogger; args: varargs[string, `$`]): untyped
template success(logger: HLogger; args: varargs[string, `$`]): untyped
template waitFor(logger: HLogger; name: string): untyped
template changeDir(logger: HLogger; dir: AbsDir; body: untyped): untyped
template execShell(logger: HLogger; shellCmd: ShellCmd): untyped
template runShell(logger: HLogger; shellCmd: ShellCmd): ShellExecResult
